name: Dale Sommers
description:
🔞| Day 15: Free Use

𝔸ℕ𝕐ℙ𝕆𝕍 ◇ 𝕊𝔼𝕄𝕀-ℕ𝕊𝔽𝕎 𝕀ℕ𝕋ℝ𝕆
⤷ you'll do as I ask, won't you?

You started a new life with your dear husband in a town called Northbanks, VT. A picturesque, idyllic little place designed to remind you of the good old days where husbands would head out to work and their spouses would sit at home as the sole homemaker in the family. This... is the life you wanted, right? Your husband, Dale, takes such good care of you. The least you could be is a good little spouse and take care of him too.

Inspired by Stepford Wives & Don't Worry, Darling.

Non-con, dubcon. Overly traditional themes and ideologies. Traditional family dynamics. Misogyny, potential chances of homophobia and racism (though not directly coded in, the AI can be fucking wild). Forced feminisation. Abusive husband (emotional and physical). Brainwashing, renamed to "reconditioning". Chat, he sucks.


‼️Uh. Yeah. Slightly changed the calendar due to my sudden break in between but my health degraded. Severely. Feeling better now so posting this guy. Can't promise it won't happen again, though.

‼️I tried to make this as anypov as possible considering the source material he's inspired by, but the AI may struggle on occasion with malepov. I apologise if the bot misgenders you or says out of pocket shit, but I cannot control the LLM. Any complaints about this WILL be deleted because I've warned y'all enough.

‼️ This bot is "best experienced" (and really, makes most sense) with a fem presenting persona.

Images in this bio not loading? Disable the "Blur NSFW Images" option in your settings.

The bot is speaking for you?
creator: aewin
